name: pixie-python

metadata.name: pixie-python
metadata.summary: Python bindings for Pixie, a full-featured 2D graphics library

documentation:
# Pixie - A full-featured 2D graphics library for Python

[Pixie](https://github.com/treeform/pixie) is a 2D graphics library similar to [Cairo](https://www.cairographics.org/) and [Skia](https://skia.org).

![Github Actions](https://github.com/treeform/pixie-python/workflows/Github%20Actions/badge.svg)

`pip install pixie-python`

Features:
* Typesetting and rasterizing text, including styled rich text via spans.
* Drawing paths, shapes and curves with even-odd and non-zero windings.
* Pixel-perfect AA quality.
* Supported file formats are PNG, BMP, JPG, SVG + more in development.
* Strokes with joins and caps.
* Shadows, glows and blurs.
* Complex masking: Subtract, Intersect, Exclude.
* Complex blends: Darken, Multiply, Color Dodge, Hue, Luminosity... etc.
* Many operations are SIMD accelerated.

### Image file formats

Format        | Read          | Write         |
------------- | ------------- | ------------- |
PNG           | ✅           | ✅            |
JPEG          | ✅           |               |
BMP           | ✅           | ✅            |
GIF           | ✅           |               |
SVG           | ✅           |               |

### Font file formats

Format        | Read
------------- | -------------
TTF           | ✅
OTF           | ✅
SVG           | ✅

### Joins and caps

Supported Caps:
  * Butt
  * Round
  * Square

Supported Joins:
  * Miter (with miter angle limit)
  * Bevel
  * Round

### Blending & masking

Supported Blend Modes:
  * Normal
  * Darken
  * Multiply
  * ColorBurn
  * Lighten
  * Screen
  * Color Dodge
  * Overlay
  * Soft Light
  * Hard Light
  * Difference
  * Exclusion
  * Hue
  * Saturation
  * Color
  * Luminosity

Supported Mask Modes:
  * Mask
  * Overwrite
  * Subtract Mask
  * Intersect Mask
  * Exclude Mask

### SVG style paths:

Format        | Supported     | Description           |
------------- | ------------- | --------------------- |
M m           | ✅            | move to               |
L l           | ✅            | line to               |
h h           | ✅            | horizontal line to    |
V v           | ✅            | vertical line to      |
C c S s       | ✅            | cublic to             |
Q q T t       | ✅            | quadratic to          |
A a           | ✅            | arc to                |
z             | ✅            | close path            |

## Testing

`pytest`

## Examples

`git clone https://github.com/treeform/pixie-python` to run examples.

### Text
python [examples/text.py](examples/text.py)
```py
font = pixie.read_font("examples/data/Roboto-Regular_1.ttf")
font.size = 20

text = "Typesetting is the arrangement and composition of text in graphic design and publishing in both digital and traditional medias."

image.fill_text(
    font,
    text,
    bounds = pixie.Vector2(180, 180),
    transform = pixie.translate(10, 10)
)
```
![example output](examples/text.png)

### Text spans
python [examples/text_spans.py](examples/text_spans.py)
```py
typeface = pixie.read_typeface("examples/data/Ubuntu-Regular_1.ttf")

def make_font(typeface, size, color):
    font = typeface.new_font()
    font.size = size
    font.paint.color = color
    return font

spans = pixie.SeqSpan()
spans.append(pixie.Span(
    "verb [with object] ",
    make_font(typeface, 12, pixie.Color(0.78125, 0.78125, 0.78125, 1))
))
spans.append(pixie.Span(
    "strallow\n",
    make_font(typeface, 36, pixie.Color(0, 0, 0, 1))
))
spans.append(pixie.Span(
    "\nstral·low\n",
    make_font(typeface, 13, pixie.Color(0, 0.5, 0.953125, 1))
))
spans.append(pixie.Span(
    "\n1. free (something) from restrictive restrictions \"the regulations are intended to strallow changes in public policy\" ",
    make_font(typeface, 14, pixie.Color(0.3125, 0.3125, 0.3125, 1))
))

image.arrangement_fill_text(
    spans.typeset(bounds = pixie.Vector2(180, 180)),
    transform = pixie.translate(10, 10)
)
```
![example output](examples/text_spans.png)

### Square
python [examples/square.py](examples/square.py)
```py
paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_SOLID)
paint.color = pixie.Color(1, 0, 0, 1)

ctx = image.new_context()
ctx.fill_style = paint

ctx.fill_rect(50, 50, 100, 100)
```
![example output](examples/square.png)

### Line
python [examples/line.py](examples/line.py)
```py
paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_SOLID)
paint.color = pixie.parse_color("#FF5C00")

ctx = image.new_context()
ctx.stroke_style = paint
ctx.line_width = 10

ctx.stroke_segment(25, 25, 175, 175)
```
![example output](examples/line.png)

### Rounded rectangle
python [examples/rounded_rectangle.py](examples/rounded_rectangle.py)
```py
paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_SOLID)
paint.color = pixie.Color(0, 1, 0, 1)

ctx = image.new_context()
ctx.fill_style = paint
ctx.rounded_rect(50, 50, 100, 100, 25, 25, 25, 25)
ctx.fill()
```
![example output](examples/rounded_rectangle.png)

### Heart
python [examples/heart.py](examples/heart.py)
```py
path = pixie.parse_path(
    """
    M 20 60
    A 40 40 90 0 1 100 60
    A 40 40 90 0 1 180 60
    Q 180 120 100 180
    Q 20 120 20 60
    z
    """
)

paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_SOLID)
paint.color = pixie.parse_color("#FC427B")

image.fill_path(path, paint)
```
![example output](examples/heart.png)

### Masking
python [examples/masking.py](examples/masking.py)
```py
lines = pixie.Image(200, 200)
lines.fill(pixie.parse_color("#FC427B"))

paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_SOLID)
paint.color = pixie.parse_color("#F8D1DD")

ctx = lines.new_context()
ctx.stroke_style = paint
ctx.line_width = 30

ctx.stroke_segment(25, 25, 175, 175)
ctx.stroke_segment(25, 175, 175, 25)

path = pixie.parse_path(
    """
    M 20 60
    A 40 40 90 0 1 100 60
    A 40 40 90 0 1 180 60
    Q 180 120 100 180
    Q 20 120 20 60
    z
    """
)

mask = pixie.Mask(200, 200)
mask.fill_path(path)

lines.mask_draw(mask)
image.draw(lines)
```
![example output](examples/masking.png)

### Gradient
python [examples/gradient.py](examples/gradient.py)
```py
paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_GRADIENT_RADIAL)

paint.gradient_handle_positions.append(pixie.Vector2(100, 100))
paint.gradient_handle_positions.append(pixie.Vector2(200, 100))
paint.gradient_handle_positions.append(pixie.Vector2(100, 200))

paint.gradient_stops.append(pixie.ColorStop(pixie.Color(1, 0, 0, 1), 0))
paint.gradient_stops.append(pixie.ColorStop(pixie.Color(1, 0, 0, 0.15625), 1))

path = pixie.parse_path(
    """
    M 20 60
    A 40 40 90 0 1 100 60
    A 40 40 90 0 1 180 60
    Q 180 120 100 180
    Q 20 120 20 60
    z
    """
)

image.fill_path(path, paint)
```
![example output](examples/gradient.png)

### Image tiled
python [examples/image_tiled.py](examples/image_tiled.py)
```py
path = pixie.Path()
path.polygon(100, 100, 70, 8)

paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_IMAGE_TILED)
paint.image = pixie.read_image("examples/data/baboon.png")
paint.image_mat = pixie.scale(0.08, 0.08)

image.fill_path(path, paint)
```
![example output](examples/image_tiled.png)

### Shadow
python [examples/shadow.py](examples/shadow.py)
```py
path = pixie.Path()
path.polygon(100, 100, 70, sides = 8)

paint = pixie.Paint(pixie.PK_SOLID)
paint.color = pixie.Color(1, 1, 1, 1)

polygon_image = pixie.Image(200, 200)
polygon_image.fill_path(path, paint)

shadow = polygon_image.shadow(
    offset = pixie.Vector2(2, 2),
    spread = 2,
    blur = 10,
    color = pixie.Color(0, 0, 0, 0.78125)
)

image.draw(shadow)
image.draw(polygon_image)
```
![example output](examples/shadow.png)

### Blur
python [examples/blur.py](examples/blur.py)
```py
trees = pixie.read_image("examples/data/trees.png")

path = pixie.Path()
path.polygon(100, 100, 70, 6)

mask = pixie.Mask(200, 200)
mask.fill_path(path)

blur = trees.copy()
blur.blur(20)
blur.mask_draw(mask)

image.draw(trees)
image.draw(blur)
```
![example output](examples/blur.png)

### Tiger
python [examples/tiger.py](examples/tiger.py)
```py
tiger = pixie.read_image("examples/data/tiger.svg")

image.draw(
    tiger,
    pixie.translate(100, 100) *
    pixie.scale(0.2, 0.2) *
    pixie.translate(-450, -450)
)
```
![example output](examples/tiger.png)

functions.name: pixie.pixie.read_image
documentation: Loads an image from a file.

functions.name: pixie.pixie.read_mask
documentation: Loads a mask from a file.

functions.name: pixie.pixie.read_typeface
documentation: Loads a typeface from a file.

functions.name: pixie.pixie.read_font
documentation: Loads a font from a file.

functions.name: pixie.pixie.parse_path
documentation: Converts a SVG style path string into seq of commands.

functions.name: pixie.pixie.miter_limit_to_angle
documentation: Converts miter-limit-ratio to miter-limit-angle.

functions.name: pixie.pixie.angle_to_miter_limit
documentation: Converts miter-limit-angle to miter-limit-ratio.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.SeqSpan.typeset
documentation:
Lays out the character glyphs and returns the arrangement.
Optional parameters:
bounds: width determines wrapping and hAlign, height for vAlign
hAlign: horizontal alignment of the text
vAlign: vertical alignment of the text
wrap: enable/disable text wrapping

methods.name: pixie.pixie.SeqSpan.layout_bounds
documentation: Computes the width and height of the spans in pixels.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.write_file
documentation: Writes an image to a file.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.copy
documentation: Copies the image data into a new image.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.get_color
documentation: Gets a color at (x, y) or returns transparent black if outside of bounds.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.set_color
documentation: Sets a color at (x, y) or does nothing if outside of bounds.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.fill
documentation: Fills the image with the color.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.flip_horizontal
documentation: Flips the image around the Y axis.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.flip_vertical
documentation: Flips the image around the X axis.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.sub_image
documentation: Gets a sub image from this image.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.minify_by2
documentation: Scales the image down by an integer scale.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.magnify_by2
documentation: Scales image up by 2 ^ power.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.apply_opacity
documentation: Multiplies alpha of the image by opacity.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.invert
documentation: Inverts all of the colors and alpha.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.blur
documentation: Applies Gaussian blur to the image given a radius.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.new_mask
documentation: Returns a new mask using the alpha values of the image.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.resize
documentation: Resize an image to a given height and width.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.shadow
documentation: Create a shadow of the image with the offset, spread and blur.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.super_image
documentation: Either cuts a sub image or returns a super image with padded transparency.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.draw
documentation: Draws one image onto another using matrix with color blending.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.mask_draw
documentation: Draws a mask onto an image using a matrix with color blending.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.fill_gradient
documentation: Fills with the Paint gradient.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.fill_text
documentation:
Typesets and fills the text. Optional parameters:
transform: translation or matrix to apply
bounds: width determines wrapping and hAlign, height for vAlign
hAlign: horizontal alignment of the text
vAlign: vertical alignment of the text

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.arrangement_fill_text
documentation: Fills the text arrangement.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.stroke_text
documentation:
Typesets and strokes the text. Optional parameters:
transform: translation or matrix to apply
bounds: width determines wrapping and hAlign, height for vAlign
hAlign: horizontal alignment of the text
vAlign: vertical alignment of the text
lineCap: stroke line cap shape
lineJoin: stroke line join shape

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.arrangement_stroke_text
documentation: Strokes the text arrangement.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.fill_path
documentation: Fills a path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.stroke_path
documentation: Strokes a path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Image.new_context
documentation: Create a new Context that will draw to the parameter image.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.write_file
documentation: Writes a mask to a file.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.copy
documentation: Copies the image data into a new image.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.get_value
documentation: Gets a value at (x, y) or returns transparent black if outside of bounds.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.set_value
documentation: Sets a value at (x, y) or does nothing if outside of bounds.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.fill
documentation: Fills the mask with the value.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.minify_by2
documentation: Scales the mask down by an integer scale.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.magnify_by2
documentation: Scales mask up by 2 ^ power.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.spread
documentation: Grows the mask by spread.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.ceil
documentation: A value of 0 stays 0. Anything else turns into 255.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.apply_opacity
documentation: Multiplies alpha of the image by opacity.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.invert
documentation: Inverts all of the values - creates a negative of the mask.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.blur
documentation: Applies Gaussian blur to the image given a radius.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.draw
documentation: Draws a mask onto a mask using a matrix with color blending.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.image_draw
documentation: Draws a image onto a mask using a matrix with color blending.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.fill_text
documentation:
Typesets and fills the text. Optional parameters:
transform: translation or matrix to apply
bounds: width determines wrapping and hAlign, height for vAlign
hAlign: horizontal alignment of the text
vAlign: vertical alignment of the text

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.arrangement_fill_text
documentation: Fills the text arrangement.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.stroke_text
documentation:
Typesets and strokes the text. Optional parameters:
transform: translation or matrix to apply
bounds: width determines wrapping and hAlign, height for vAlign
hAlign: horizontal alignment of the text
vAlign: vertical alignment of the text
lineCap: stroke line cap shape
lineJoin: stroke line join shape

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.arrangement_stroke_text
documentation: Strokes the text arrangement.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.fill_path
documentation: Fills a path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Mask.stroke_path
documentation: Strokes a path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Paint.new_paint
documentation: Create a new Paint with the same properties.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.transform
documentation: Apply a matrix transform to a path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.add_path
documentation: Adds a path to the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.close_path
documentation:
Attempts to add a straight line from the current point to the start of
the current sub-path. If the shape has already been closed or has only
one point, this function does nothing.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.compute_bounds
documentation: Compute the bounds of the path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.fill_overlaps
documentation: Returns whether or not the specified point is contained in the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.stroke_overlaps
documentation:
Returns whether or not the specified point is inside the area contained
by the stroking of a path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.move_to
documentation: Begins a new sub-path at the point (x, y).

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.line_to
documentation:
Adds a straight line to the current sub-path by connecting the sub-path's
last point to the specified (x, y) coordinates.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.bezier_curve_to
documentation:
Adds a cubic Bézier curve to the current sub-path. It requires three
points: the first two are control points and the third one is the end
point. The starting point is the latest point in the current path,
which can be changed using moveTo() before creating the Bézier curve.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.quadratic_curve_to
documentation:
Adds a quadratic Bézier curve to the current sub-path. It requires two
points: the first one is a control point and the second one is the end
point. The starting point is the latest point in the current path,
which can be changed using moveTo() before creating the quadratic
Bézier curve.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.elliptical_arc_to
documentation:
Adds an elliptical arc to the current sub-path, using the given radius
ratios, sweep flags, and end position.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.arc
documentation: Adds a circular arc to the current sub-path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.arc_to
documentation:
Adds a circular arc using the given control points and radius.
Commonly used for making rounded corners.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.rect
documentation:
Adds a rectangle.
Clockwise param can be used to subtract a rect from a path when using
even-odd winding rule.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.rounded_rect
documentation:
Adds a rounded rectangle.
Clockwise param can be used to subtract a rect from a path when using
even-odd winding rule.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.ellipse
documentation: Adds a ellipse.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.circle
documentation: Adds a circle.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Path.polygon
documentation:
Adds an n-sided regular polygon at (x, y) with the parameter size.
Polygons "face" north.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.ascent
documentation: The font ascender value in font units.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.descent
documentation: The font descender value in font units.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.line_gap
documentation: The font line gap value in font units.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.line_height
documentation: The default line height in font units.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.has_glyph
documentation: Returns if there is a glyph for this rune.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.get_glyph_path
documentation: The glyph path for the rune.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.get_advance
documentation: The advance for the rune in pixels.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Typeface.get_kerning_adjustment
documentation: The kerning adjustment for the rune pair, in pixels.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Font.scale
documentation: The scale factor to transform font units into pixels.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Font.default_line_height
documentation: The default line height in pixels for the current font size.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Font.typeset
documentation:
Lays out the character glyphs and returns the arrangement.
Optional parameters:
bounds: width determines wrapping and hAlign, height for vAlign
hAlign: horizontal alignment of the text
vAlign: vertical alignment of the text
wrap: enable/disable text wrapping

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Font.layout_bounds
documentation: Computes the width and height of the text in pixels.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Arrangement.layout_bounds
documentation: Computes the width and height of the arrangement in pixels.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.save
documentation:
Saves the entire state of the context by pushing the current state onto
a stack.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.save_layer
documentation:
Saves the entire state of the context by pushing the current state onto
a stack and allocates a new image layer for subsequent drawing. Calling
restore blends the current layer image onto the prior layer or root image.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.restore
documentation:
Restores the most recently saved context state by popping the top entry
in the drawing state stack. If there is no saved state, this method does
nothing.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.begin_path
documentation: Starts a new path by emptying the list of sub-paths.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.close_path
documentation:
Attempts to add a straight line from the current point to the start of
the current sub-path. If the shape has already been closed or has only
one point, this function does nothing.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.fill
documentation: Fills the current path with the current fillStyle.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.path_fill
documentation: Fills the path with the current fillStyle.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.clip
documentation:
Turns the current path into the current clipping region. The previous
clipping region, if any, is intersected with the current or given path
to create the new clipping region.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.path_clip
documentation:
Turns the path into the current clipping region. The previous clipping
region, if any, is intersected with the current or given path to create
the new clipping region.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.stroke
documentation: Strokes (outlines) the current or given path with the current strokeStyle.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.path_stroke
documentation: Strokes (outlines) the current or given path with the current strokeStyle.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.measure_text
documentation:
Returns a TextMetrics object that contains information about the measured
text (such as its width, for example).

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.get_transform
documentation: Retrieves the current transform matrix being applied to the context.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.set_transform
documentation: Overrides the transform matrix being applied to the context.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.transform
documentation:
Multiplies the current transform with the matrix described by the
arguments of this method.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.reset_transform
documentation: Resets the current transform to the identity matrix.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.draw_image
documentation: Draws a source image onto the destination image.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.move_to
documentation: Begins a new sub-path at the point (x, y).

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.line_to
documentation:
Adds a straight line to the current sub-path by connecting the sub-path's
last point to the specified (x, y) coordinates.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.bezier_curve_to
documentation:
Adds a cubic Bézier curve to the current sub-path. It requires three
points: the first two are control points and the third one is the end
point. The starting point is the latest point in the current path,
which can be changed using moveTo() before creating the Bézier curve.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.quadratic_curve_to
documentation:
Adds a quadratic Bézier curve to the current sub-path. It requires two
points: the first one is a control point and the second one is the end
point. The starting point is the latest point in the current path,
which can be changed using moveTo() before creating the quadratic
Bézier curve.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.arc
documentation: Draws a circular arc.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.arc_to
documentation: Draws a circular arc using the given control points and radius.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.rect
documentation: Adds a rectangle to the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.rounded_rect
documentation: Adds a rounded rectangle to the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.ellipse
documentation: Adds an ellipse to the current sub-path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.circle
documentation: Adds a circle to the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.polygon
documentation: Adds an n-sided regular polygon at (x, y) of size to the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.clear_rect
documentation: Erases the pixels in a rectangular area.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.fill_rect
documentation: Draws a rectangle that is filled according to the current fillStyle.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.stroke_rect
documentation:
Draws a rectangle that is stroked (outlined) according to the current
strokeStyle and other context settings.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.stroke_segment
documentation:
Strokes a segment (draws a line from ax, ay to bx, by) according
to the current strokeStyle and other context settings.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.fill_text
documentation:
Draws the outlines of the characters of a text string at the specified
coordinates.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.stroke_text
documentation:
Draws the outlines of the characters of a text string at the specified
coordinates.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.translate
documentation: Adds a translation transformation to the current matrix.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.scale
documentation:
Adds a scaling transformation to the context units horizontally and/or
vertically.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.rotate
documentation: Adds a rotation to the transformation matrix.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.is_point_in_path
documentation: Returns whether or not the specified point is contained in the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.path_is_point_in_path
documentation: Returns whether or not the specified point is contained in the current path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.is_point_in_stroke
documentation:
Returns whether or not the specified point is inside the area contained
by the stroking of a path.

methods.name: pixie.pixie.Context.path_is_point_in_stroke
documentation:
Returns whether or not the specified point is inside the area contained
by the stroking of a path.
